builds.title: Battleaxe Mist Build
builds.description: This build is a well-rounded Battleaxe build that can deal with most situations. It is a melee weapon that has a lot of sustain and can deal a lot of damage. It is a great weapon for solo and small scale players. This particular build is focused for solo Mists players.
builds.author: Arreat Regaro

builds.title: Battleaxe Open World PVE/PVP Build
builds.description:
Have a balance between power and cost-benefit. I recommend this build for doing solo PVP/PVE content in the open world, such as camps or dungeons. While you do this, you can kill other players who are farming camps or just gathering resources. Use the invisibility potion to get to these players without them noticing. Your Fiend Cowl helmet is an important piece to keep these players from escaping, as its ability will nullify their boots, so use it at the right time.

You can use Muisak as an alternative to Off-Hand, but you will spend a lot of mana doing PVE, which is why I opted for the torch, which is cheap and keeps my mana stable.
builds.author: Matheus Dragneel

builds.title: Bloodmoon Staff (DPS) Crystal Arena Build
builds.description:
Your main role with this setup is to dive into the opposing team's backline and target their healer and ranged DPS. While you're durable and have lifesteal, it's crucial to retreat to your healer when needed.

This build shines in duo or trio setups, where coordination is easier, but it's less effective in premade 5v5 teams. In those situations, a well-coordinated enemy team can easily counter you.
builds.author: Nihalz

builds.title: Blazing Staff Ava Gold Chests
builds.description:
PT/BR: O Blazing Staff / Fulgurante não tem segredo! Use o Robe Real antes do Tank agrar os MOBS, use a habilidade das sandálias "F" e depois use o "E", o "Q" e o "W" para cancelar algumas habilidades dos mobs.
Use o capuz de Assassino para resetar suas habilidades!

EN: Blazing Staff / Blazing Staff has no secret! Use the Royal Robe before the Tank hits the MOBS, use the sandals ability "F" and then use "E", "Q" and "W" to cancel some mobs' abilities.
Use the Assassin's Hood to reset your abilities!
builds.author: TutoriAlbion

builds.title: Bow of Badon Support Group Fame Farm Build
builds.author: Ferii

builds.title: Hallowfall Healer Ava Gold Chests
builds.description:
PT/BR: Use o  Elmo de Guarda-Tumbas somente quando Tank estiver com pouca vida!
Lembre-se que a cura prioritária é sempre no Tank, o restante do grupo precisa desviar das habilidades dos mobs.
O Robe Real pode ser usado na segunda rotação de Skills para potencializar o dano do grupo.
E por fim, o Healer não precisa ficar junto do grupo, podendo se posicionar mais para o lado e um pouco perto do tank, mas longe o suficiente dos mobs.

EN: Use the Graveguard Helmet only when the Tank is low on health!
Remember that the priority healing is always on the Tank, the rest of the group needs to dodge the mobs' skills.
The Royal Robe can be used in the second Skill rotation to increase the group's damage.
Finally, the Healer does not need to stay with the group, and can position himself more to the side and a little closer to the tank, but far enough away from the mobs.
builds.author: TutoriAlbion

builds.title: Infinity Blade Backline Dive - Crystal Arena
builds.description:
Build is intended to be backline dive, your main target with this build is and always should be the enemy healer. 

Your cape slot can either be Thetford or Avalonian, i personally use the thetford over the avalonian because of the quicker cooldown for more overall dps when attempting to stick to a healer and burn their health/mana.

Rotation for engaging, look to see if you can engage on the enemy healer to begin with, if you can not get onto the enemy healer look to poke opponents with your 1 weapon ability ( Q ) and back out to your healer. 

If you are able to dive into the backline and engage on the healer, you should look to open with your Q as you would the poking stage. Your weapon ability 3 ( E ) is used for helping close gaps as well as giving you a massive damage buff for 5 seconds. 

if you get onto the healer look to use skills as followed:
Chest >  Boots >  AA >  Weapon 3 >  AA >   Weapon 1 >  AA >  Weapon 2 >  AA ~ Use skills on cooldown as needed from this point. 
(AA is Auto Attack)

Your helmet is a powerful tool allowing you to purge many meta items such as Hellion Jackets and Cleric Robe as well as a lot of move speed boot options, it is a targetable AoE that both purges as well as cleanses allies. Try to save it for possible Cleric Robe on healer if needed and possible. If that's not necessary i recommend mainly using it as a cleanse tool for your team.

The recommended setup is if you have a healer that is willing to dive/semi dive the backline with you. If you dont have a healer willing to "go in" with you I would highly recommend using the alternate build path, so having a swap set is very helpful in my personal opinion.

(This build is a work in progress, im currently Gold 2 this season and have solo queue climbed with this setup and playstyle.)
builds.author: Khizzixxx

builds.title: Dagger Solo Tracking Build
builds.description: This is a cheap and easy build for beginners to start tracking. You can solo beasts up to tier 7 quickly, but after that, switching to a ranged build is better. Beasts like the Dawnbird have many abilities you need to dodge, making melee combat difficult.
builds.author: Identy

builds.title: Druidic Staff Solo Open World Camps Build
builds.description: This build is **cheap** and **clears mobs efficiently**. However, you should **avoid most fights** unless you have experience playing **Nature Staff**.

builds.title: Shadowcaller Ava Gold Chests
builds.description:
PT/BR: O Chama sombras deve usar seu "E" no TANK quando ele agrar os mobs, em seguida use o Elmo de Espreitador "D" para aumentar o dano do grupo, o "W" para  reduzir a resistência do mob e o "Q" para ajudar no DPS.
Ative o Casaco Real para resetar as skills do seu grupo.
Você também pode usar as Sandálias de Sectário "F" para reduzir a defesa e cura do MOB, mas precisar ficar do lado dele.

EN: Shadowcaller should use his "E" on TANK when he buffs the mobs, then use the Stalker Helmet "D" to increase the group's damage, the "W" to reduce the mob's resistance and the "Q" to help with DPS. 
Activate the Royal Coat to reset your group's skills. 
You can also use the Cultist Sandals "F" to reduce the MOB's defense and healing, but you need to stay on his side.
builds.author: TutoriAlbion

builds.title: Lightcaller Ava Gold Chests
builds.description:
PT/BR: Para ser sincero, não estudei sobre as habilidades dos metamorfos, mas sei que quanto mais stacks tem, maior o dano!
Então aproveite a capa de Caerleon para stackar seu "Q" 2x, e antes de usar seu "Ultimate" use o Robe de Druida "R".

EN: To be honest, I haven't studied the shapeshifter skills, but I know that the more stacks you have, the greater the damage!
So take advantage of Caerleon's cape to stack your "Q" 2x, and before using your "Ultimate" use the Druid Robe "R".
builds.author: TutoriAlbion

builds.title: 1H Spear  Open World Build
builds.description: Just my personal build based on YouTubers and experience. The helmet is priceless to mount up if you are caught by gankers while fighting mobs.
